title: Premier LB112383WW B-O 100 Led Lights, Warm White
features: 100 LED bulbs and bulb span 9.9 m
description: Product Description Lights up home or garden with these multi action time lights, suitable for both indoor and outdoor. Good for use year round with battery operation these lights will last up to 30 days at a time 100 LED bulbs, Bulb span 9.9 m, 0.3 m cable from battery to first LED, 10 cm bulb spacing, 6 hrs on and 18 hrs off. Timer function and multi action controller: 1. Combinations 2. Steady on 3. In wave 4. Twin-light chasing 5.In wave or twinkle flashing 6.Slo-Glo 7. Stepping on 8.Slow-fade. Box Contains 1 x 100 Battery Time Lights, Warm White
